reviews.comment:
Extremadamente lenta la atención del playero. Estuve 45 minutos esperando para que me despache, había sólo dos autos adelante mío y otro vehículo al otro extremo del surtidor  que encima llegó mucho después que yo y fué atendido antes. NO RECOMENDABLE

(Translated by Google)
The service from the gas station attendant was extremely slow. I waited 45 minutes to be served; there were only two cars ahead of me and another vehicle at the other end of the pump that arrived much later than me and was served first. NOT RECOMMENDED
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpbWFUejlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, buen servicio, y muy limpio todo en el área del Minimercado y bar... Un excelente área afuera para poder descansar y tomar un café y eso se valora cuando venís de un viaje largo.
En la playa también muy amables y buena atención.
El día que fuí no aceptaban tarjeta para cargar, (supuestamente no tenian sistema) espero que no lo usen de excusa muy seguido, y quiero creer que era verdad.
Muy recomendable, a pesar de ese pequeño gran detalle.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and attention, and everything was very clean in the minimarket and bar area. There's a great outdoor area to relax and have a coffee, which is much appreciated after a long trip. The staff on the beach were also very friendly and provided good service. The day I went, they weren't accepting credit cards (supposedly their system was down). I hope they don't use that as an excuse too often, and I want to believe it was true. Highly recommended, despite that small but significant detail.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpMHJqdURREAE

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicios YPF de Cipolletti fue remodelada en 2020. Es la estación más completa de Cipolletti. Se encuentra sobre ruta 22, y tiene buen acceso.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF Cipolletti service station was remodeled in 2020. It is the most comprehensive station in Cipolletti. It is located on Route 22 and has good access.

reviews.comment:
Es una ypf! pero ese día no andaban los puntos serviclub en el shop, el playero no te avisa de la promo que podía ahorrar 500p en la carga de infinia. En shop el dispenser de alcohol estaba vacío y sucio.

(Translated by Google)
It's a YPF!, but the Serviclub points weren't available in the shop that day. The attendant didn't tell you about the promotion that could save you 500p on Infinia refills. The alcohol dispenser in the shop was empty and dirty.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpaU9UYlV3EAE
